howItWorks.title: How it Works
howItWorks.description: FinnaFlow aggregates your income and expenses into a centralized "Wallet Hub". It then distributes those funds into specific needs, wants, and savings pools based on your categories.

fillingInputs.title: Filling Inputs
fillingInputs.description: Enter your gross income sources (salaries, dividends) and recurring expenses. Choose a frequency (Weekly/Monthly/Yearly) and we'll automatically calculate the monthly average for you.

smartAnalysis.title: Cash Flow Insights
smartAnalysis.description: The chart highlights 'Unallocated Surplus' (money not yet assigned to a category) or 'Budget Deficit' (where spending exceeds income). Use these visual summaries to adjust your 50/30/20 distribution.

hints.label: Name of the source or spending item
hints.amount: The numeric value of the item
hints.frequency: How often this occurs (re-averaged to monthly)
hints.endDate: Optional: date when this item stops
hints.save: Download your financial state as a JSON file
hints.load: Restore from a previously saved JSON session
hints.reset: Clear all data and start a fresh session
hints.csvExport: Export data for use in spreadsheet software
hints.csvImport: Bulk upload data from a CSV file
hints.theme: Toggle between Light and Dark mode

inputs.noItemsHint: Use the form above to add your first item

netWorth.title: Net Worth Explorer
netWorth.subtitle: Assets - Liabilities
netWorth.wealthSubtitle: Track your global assets, liabilities, and financial resilience in real-time.
netWorth.proTipContent: Assets are more than just cash. Include stocks, physical property, or even valuable digital collectibles to get a true picture of your net worth.

tracker.title: Financial Freedom Tracker
tracker.subtitle: Calculate your journey towards early retirement based on the 4% rule.
tracker.projectionNote: Data uses your current net worth as the starting baseline.

chart.title: Visual Cash Flow
chart.emptyState: Add some income and expenses to see your flow.

budgeting.title: 50/30/20 Budgeting Rule
budgeting.description: This professional strategy recommends dividing your after-tax income into three categories: 50% for Needs (essentials like rent and utilities), 30% for Wants (lifestyle and hobbies), and 20% for Savings or Debt repayment. FinnaFlow helps you see if your current cash flow matches this ideal distribution for long-term health.

privacy.title: Local-First Privacy Architecture
privacy.description: Security is our core priority. FinnaFlow uses a Zero-Server architecture, meaning your financial data is stored and processed exclusively within your local browser's storage. We do not track, collect, or upload your data to any external servers, ensuring your financial secrets remain 100% private and under your control.

footer.tagline: Your finance. Your privacy. Your call.
footer.disclaimer: FinnaFlow is an independent budgeting tool for educational and informational purposes only. It does not constitute financial, investment, or tax advice. Always consult a qualified professional before making financial decisions.

wiki.title: FinnaFlow Wiki
wiki.subtitle: Complete guide to cash flow visualization and professional data management.

csv.title: CSV Import / Export
csv.description: Import bulk data using CSV files by following this exact structure in your header row:
csv.useQuotes: Use quotes if names have commas

inflation.title: Inflation Simulator
inflation.description: Simulates global cost-of-living increases. It applies a multiplier to every expense item simultaneously.

market.title: Market Shock
market.description: Simulates downturns targeting investment-linked income (e.g., Dividends) to test your cash flow floor.

privacy.title: Zero-Server Architecture
privacy.description: FinnaFlow is built as a Local-First application. Your bank details and financial secrets never touch a server. All calculations and storage happen locally on your hardware.

wiki.footer: FinnaFlow Wiki • Your Finance, Your Cash Flow
wiki.disclaimer: This tool is provided as-is for personal budgeting purposes. It does not provide financial advice.

onboarding.title: Welcome to FinnaFlow
onboarding.subtitle: Tailor your financial visualizer before we begin.
onboarding.privacyNote: All data is stored locally. No servers. No tracking.

nudge.needsHigh: Your needs are above the recommended 50%. Consider auditing fixed costs like subscriptions or utilities.
nudge.wantsHigh: Spending on wants exceeds 30%. Try the 48-hour rule for impulsive purchases.
nudge.savingsLow: Savings are below 20%. Aim to automate a small increase in your monthly contributions.

batchPaste.title: Intelligent Ingestion
batchPaste.subtitle: Paste raw text from your bank app or statement to automatically extract transactions.
batchPaste.placeholder: Paste transaction text from bank app...
batchPaste.privacyNotice: Heuristics run locally in your browser. No sensitive data leaves your device.
